title: Implement an RFC-4180-ish CSV parser in csv.mjs
prompt: Implement `parseCsv(text)` in csv.mjs. It must split CSV text into an array of rows (arrays of string fields), supporting: comma separators; double-quoted fields; commas and newlines inside quoted fields; escaped double quotes inside quoted fields written as "" (two double quotes); both \n and \r\n line endings. A trailing final newline does not produce an extra empty row. Empty input returns [].
